notes.body: Hub tickets for maintenance — going forward, any time we call out an outsourced company for plumbing, electrical, or any other items, we still submit a hub ticket for tracking and warranty purposes.
Is Naudia Pate Hickey still employed at 2065? Hired 12/31/2025, still active in the system, but has not received a pay stub. Needs an answer from Bobby.
Angela Ashby is processed and good to schedule. In the directory, phone still pending. Rusul Kadhim onboarding + BG check sent (Victoria) — in progress, not cleared yet.

June budget at bottom of the 2065 sheet (DoorDash + UberEats promos baked in) — name the daily target at huddle. Large Soda now 30c more than Regular (not 10c). Blackberry counter sign posted. Orientation Checklist with all new hires.
